durability.label: Likely bet down
durability.basis: A short board price the late money bets down. Still a win play, but expect a shorter number by post — pari-mutuel pays the closing price, so the edge is thinner here. Size it smaller.

edge_of_day.why: The biggest edge on today's card.

attribution: Powered by Brisnet data. Analysis, not wagering advice. 18+/21+ (where required). 1-800-GAMBLER.

durability.label: Price should hold
durability.basis: A long board price the late money tends to leave alone, so you should still get a strong number at post — the fullest version of the edge.

bet.instruction: Bet $2 on #7 to win — paid at the closing price (our fair 6/1).

exotics.note: Model-fair reference prices, not a +EV call. Exotics take ~20% off the top, so a pool is an overlay only when the tote's probable pays more than the fair return.
